name: sentry-enterprise-rbac
description: Configure enterprise role-based access control, SSO/SAML2, and SCIM provisioning in Sentry. Use when setting up organization hierarchy, team permissions, identity provider integration, API token governance, or audit logging for compliance. Trigger: "sentry rbac", "sentry permissions", "sentry team access", "sentry sso setup", "sentry scim", "sentry audit log".
